name: Howard Mast Tennis Courts; Lake Meade Park
description: Howard Mast Tennis Courts; Lake Meade Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Suffolk, VA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: Suffolk Racquet Club
description: Suffolk Racquet Club is a place to play pickleball in Suffolk, VA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Members only — Members only. Soon to have nominal Drop-In fee
